title: Westland Ericaceous Planting & Potting Mix 10L
features: Item Volume: With a generous 10L capacity, this mix is perfect for potting and repotting, providing your plants with the right amount of soil to establish a healthy root system.
EAN: 5023377009594, a unique identifier for this product, guarantees authenticity and high-quality standards set by Westland.
Recommended Browse Nodes: Categorized under 169508031, indicating it as an ideal choice for planting and potting mixes, specifically designed for ericaceous plants.
Item Type: As a soil product, it enriches the soil with essential nutrients, improving its structure and water retention capacity, promoting healthier plant growth.
description: Product description Introducing the Westland Ericaceous Planting & Potting Mix, a 10L specialized soil mix designed for acid-loving plants. This product, identified by the EAN 5023377009594, is ideal for use in the '169508031' recommended browse node. The Westland brand is known for its high-quality gardening products, and this mix is no exception. It is perfect for promoting the healthy growth of plants that thrive in more acidic soil conditions. The mix is easy to use and offers optimal volume for your planting needs. Please refer to the care instructions for specific use and storage guidelines. Experience the Westland difference and help your ericaceous plants reach their full potential. Safety Warning Store in a frost free place and away from weed killers and other garden chemicals. Use in a well ventilated place and avoid breathing in dust. Always wear gloves when gardening and wash hands after use.
